title: Simple Redstone Wires
body:
# Simple Redstone Wires Resourcepack

**A clean and simple resource pack for Minecraft that improves the appearance of Redstone wires, making them easier to follow and more visually appealing.**

## Description

The **Simple Redstone Wires Resourcepack** is designed to make the Redstone experience in Minecraft smoother and more intuitive. This resource pack replaces the default Redstone wire textures with cleaner and simpler designs, helping players easily identify and trace Redstone circuits in their builds.

Whether you're building complex contraptions or working with simpler Redstone circuits, this pack improves visibility and helps reduce visual clutter while maintaining the default Minecraft aesthetic.

## Features

- **Simplified Redstone Wire Texture:** Clean and minimalistic wire design to help easily trace connections.
- **Improved Visibility:** Makes Redstone circuits more noticeable, especially in large builds.
- **Compatible with Default Minecraft Look:** Works seamlessly with the default Minecraft texture style while enhancing Redstone wiring.
- **No Changes to Gameplay:** Focused purely on visual improvements without affecting any mechanics or gameplay.

## Installation

1. Download the **Simple Redstone Wires Resourcepack** from Modrinth.
2. Open Minecraft and go to the **Options** menu.
3. Select **Resource Packs**.
4. Click **Open Resource Pack Folder**.
5. Drag the downloaded `.zip` file into the folder.
6. Back in Minecraft, click on the resource pack and move it to the "Selected" section.
7. Click **Done** to apply the pack.

## Compatibility

- Minecraft version: **1.16+**
- Compatible with most other resource packs.
- Works in both single-player and multiplayer.

## Screenshots

![Redstone Wire Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fzbxcWUe/images/9f17462b3e516a81109941834bc031cd542cf279_350.webp)


Enjoy a cleaner, simpler Redstone experience with the **Simple Redstone Wires Resourcepack**!
